prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully rebuilt and bored-out *Lancia V6 Tipo 827.000* (2.5L, 60° V6) with forged Mahle pistons (85mm bore, 10.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from *JE Pistons* to handle 300+ HP reliably. Pair with a *Weber 48 IDA* triple-carburetor setup (custom velocity stacks by *ITG*) and a *Shorrock C75* supercharger (10 psi max boost) for linear power delivery.

Chassis reinforcement via a *Giannini* full tubular space frame (B24-specific, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with integrated *Sparco* bolt-in roll cage (FIA-approved, 3-point harness mounts). Suspension overhaul with *Öhlins DFV* coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 20mm drop) and *Polygraphite* bushings for the *Lancia B24* rear De Dion tube, paired with *Brembo GT* 4-pot calipers (330mm vented rotors) and *Ferodo DS2500* pads for vintage racing compliance.

Drivetrain upgrade with a *ZF S5-31* 5-speed dogleg gearbox (close-ratio, synchro-less 1st gear) mated to a *Quaife ATB* helical LSD (25% lockup). Clutch system features a *Tilton* twin-plate ceramic setup (7.25" diameter) with a *Spec Stage 4+* pressure plate, paired with a *Peloquin* differential for the De Dion rear end (3.78:1 final drive).
estetica: Bodywork restoration with *Pininfarina*-authenticated aluminum panels (hand-beaten, 1.2mm thickness) and a *PPG* custom paint scheme in *Arancio Chiaro* (original 1955 Lancia hue) with *House of Kolor* Kandy Apple Red pinstriping. Front grille replaced with a *Radford* mesh unit (brass construction, gold-plated) and *Marchal* 180mm headlights (H4 conversion, Cibie projectors).

Interior reupholstered in *Conolly Vaumol* leather (Bridge of Weir hide, *Scottish Tan* color) with *Recaro SRD* seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved, 3" narrower than stock to fit the B24’s cockpit). Steering wheel replaced with a *Nardi* 380mm wood-rim (walnut, quick-release hub) and *Smiths* vintage gauges (3.5" speedo, 4" tach, oil/water/fuel in *Jaeger* housings).

Aerodynamic package featuring a *Touring Superleggera*-inspired rear ducktail spoiler (hand-formed aluminum, 15mm height) and *Aeroflow* underbody diffusers (carbon-Kevlar, bolt-on for the B24’s flat floor). Wheels are *Borrani* 72-spoke wire wheels (16x5" front, 16x6" rear) with *Pirelli P Zero Corsa* tires (185/55R16 front, 205/50R16 rear) and *Lockwood* knock-off spinners (brass, polished).
